summary: Canonical INGEST encode: bake rotation, VFR→CFR, square the pixels, HDR→SDR tonemap, multichannel→centered stereo, 8-bit 4:2:0 h264 + bounded autograde. The MECHANIC of ingest_normalize — WHAT to correct is measured on the brain and arrives as numeric params.

parity.note: The vf/audio/encoder argv is a PURE function of the params (target dims, tonemap transfer, fps, source channel count, the autograde brightness/contrast/saturation numbers), so libx264 at the pinned preset/crf over identical input bytes emits identical output bytes. tests/test_op_media_normalize.py pins video_filter()/argv() as strings, renders twice on the libx264 path (MONTY_OPS_CPU_ENCODE=1) and sha256-compares, and pins the eq= against autograde.grade_filter so an autograde drift reddens. This normalizes the raw source pixels EVERY downstream decision reads (ASR, Director, all measures) — a pixel shift here silently moves every decision below it, which is why the bar is byte-exact and not perceptual. WHICH corrections apply (needs_normalize gating, the autograde MEASUREMENT) is decided on the brain and crosses as data; NVENC is the fast default and non-reproducible run-to-run like every encoder op, which is a version-pin property of the image, not this op.

width.description: Target width — the TRUE displayed width (stored dims swapped if rotated 90/270), rounded even, native resolution KEPT (no downscale here; the final crop happens downstream). Decided on the brain from the probe.

height.description: Target height — the TRUE displayed height, rounded even. Aspect is preserved (decrease + pad), never squashed.

fps.description: Canonical constant frame rate. VFR sources desync the cut; force CFR at this fps.

tonemap.description: Source HDR transfer to tonemap SDR→bt709 (hlg = iPhone default, pq). 'none' = an SDR source, no tonemap. The zscale+tonemap=hable chain is the handler's; this names WHICH transfer, not the filtergraph.

audio_channels.description: Source audio channel count. >2 (quad/5.1 mono-in-a-container) → SUM all channels into BOTH stereo channels (voice CENTERED); 1/2 → plain stereo. The DECISION is the channel count from the probe; the pan is the handler's.

grade.description: Bounded autograde correction (±8%), MEASURED on the brain (autograde.measure/plan). Absent or identity → no eq. NOT an editorial grade — a mechanical exposure/saturation nudge toward neutral.
